reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Es del ACA .Tiene el combustible más barato. En el buffet hacen el mejor café de La Plata. Y las medialunas, EXCELENTES.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) station. They have the cheapest fuel. The buffet serves the best coffee in La Plata. And the croissants are EXCELLENT.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMnRyR2tRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muchos bancos rotos
No hay diagonales para cruzar la plaza
Muchos pisos pintarrajeadas, etc..

(Translated by Google)
Many broken benches
No diagonal walkways to cross the square
Many floors covered in graffiti, etc.
